steps.title: Parse the second part
steps.content: After the blank, "the stitching barely visible among the thousands of pieces" is a descriptive noun phrase, not a complete sentence. It adds detail about how the quilts look up close.

steps.title: Choose comma description
steps.content: A uses comma plus "and" as if another independent clause follows. C uses a semicolon before a phrase. D creates a fragment. The remaining punctuation attaches the descriptive phrase correctly. The answer is B.
